mapper.sql: id, user_id, counselor_user_id, start_time, duration_minutes, status, note, idempotency_key, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM consult_appointment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM consult_appointment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consult_appointment (user_id, counselor_user_id, start_time, duration_minutes, status, note, idempotency_key, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{counselorUserId}, #{startTime}, #{durationMinutes}, #{status, typeHandler=com.example.mentalhealth.mapper.typehandler.AppointmentStatusTypeHandler}, #{note}, #{idempotencyKey}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE consult_appointment SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
